zh.lifeSummary: Roger Dayrell是John Dairell和Joan Dairell的兒子，於1338年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾。他於1363年與Joan Agmundesham Dairell在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾利林斯同 代雷爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於大約1407年享年70歲。

nameMeanings.name: Dayrell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: Roger Dayrell was born in 1338, in Buckinghamshire, England as the son of John Dairell and Joan Dairell. He married Joan Agmundesham Dairell in 1363, in Lillingstone Dayrell, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died about 1407, at the age of 70.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger Dayrellは1338年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアでJohn DairellとJoan Dairellの息子として生まれた。1363年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアリリングストーン デイレルでJoan Agmundesham Dairellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は約1407年に70歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Roger Dayrell(은)는 1338년 영국 벅잉함실르에서 John Dairell(와)과 Joan Dairell의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1363년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 릴링스톤 데이렐에서 Joan Agmundesham Dairell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1407년 70세의 나이로 사망했다.

Он женился на женщине по имени Joan Agmundesham Dairell в 1363 г. в местности лиллингстоун деирелл, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери.
